title: juniperus communis subsp. montana
intro: Juniperus communis subsp. montana, commonly known as Mountain Juniper, is a subspecies of the Juniperus communis tree, native to mountainous regions in Europe. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Juniper include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as support for the immune system and its antioxidant properties. Mountain Juniper can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
